channel.title: PENN — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on PENN (PENN Entertainment) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: David Einhorn: EXITED PENN · Q3 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) exited PENN in Q3 2025. Closed PENN Entertainment fully.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Einhorn)
